title: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Research Assistant Posts
shortInfo: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Research Associate and Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website tiss.edu. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the TISS Research Associate and Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Research Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Research Associate and Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website tiss.edu. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the TISS Research Associate and Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD Or Master's degree in Social Work, Disaster Management, Public Health, Environmental Studies, Geography, or a related discipline
qualification.details: Research Associate: PhD in Social Work, Public Health, Environmental Sciences, Geography or a related discipline. Research Assistant: Master's degree in Social Work, Disaster Management, Public Health, Environmental Studies, Geography, or a related discipline.

salary_details.details: Research Associate: ₹75,000 per month (consolidated) Research Assistant: ₹50,000 - ₹55,000 per month depending on experience

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the TISS Recruitment 2026 is 30 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Associate and Research Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by TISS for the positions of Research Associate and Research Assistant. One vacancy is for Research Associate and the other is for Research Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Research Associate position, candidates must hold a PhD in Social Work, Public Health, Environmental Sciences, Geography, or a closely related discipline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Assistant position ranges from ₹50,000 to ₹55,000 per month, with the exact amount depending on the candidate's experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these TISS posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate and Research Assistant positions at TISS will primarily involve an interview. This interview can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for TISS Recruitment 2026 is through email. Candidates need to send their application along with required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for the TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any minimum or maximum age limits for these positions. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any age-related criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of all necessary documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for TISS Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
